text:
After the last successful $100 > $1000 challenge, a lot of people asked in the replies and DMs for a new one starting with a smaller bankroll.

So let's do it. $50 > ??? by the final.

🇵🇦 Panama vs 🇬🇧 England | Bet #1 

Panama has nothing left to play for in this World Cup. Their motivation is basically zero. They could come out, play some open football, and give their fans something to enjoy, but I don't think that's happening. I'd expect their coach to stick with a typical defensive 4-5-1 setup.

I'm expecting something like a 0-2 win for England, with plenty of attempts to break down Panama's low block. Because of that, I also expect England to rely on set pieces, just like they did in their previous two matches.

My pick: $50 on England to win by 2+ goals and have 7+ corners.

P.S. The original plan was for the first combo of this challenge to include three different matches at much higher odds, but right now Polymarket only lets you build combos within a single match.

Manage your risk, and enjoy the game!

How am I supposed to start a new challenge when I've been getting "Updating Payout" for over an hour every time I try to build a combo?

@Polymarket, please fix this and add total shots and yellow cards markets for the World Cup playoffs!!!! https://t.co/wjZDCyoOOQ

Dear @polymarket, please add total shots markets for the World Cup knockout stage, please.

I swear I'll bet every single match all the way to the final. I need this so bad.

Guys, the results of the $50 giveaway are coming in the next few days. I've been busy polishing the HuskyWeather terminal.

Once I announce the winner, we'll either start a new challenge or continue the old one. Haven't decided yet.

The World Cup keeps delivering. I just haven't been posting about it on X. Here are some of the singles I've hit, and there were also a couple of successful combos. Unfortunately, after they settled, I couldn't find them in my Polymarket history anymore.

By the way, I'll send the $50 to the winner directly through their Polymarket account as a tip. So if you don't have an account yet, make one. Even better if you sign up using my referral link🫡

Polymarket WORLD CUP CHALLENGE $100 → $1000 | Bet #9 | Bank: $866

Netherlands vs Sweden delivered exactly the kind of game I described earlier, another win.

🇩🇪 Germany vs Ivory Coast 🇨🇮

Two solid teams with strong attacking potential and some defensive weaknesses. Germany are favorites, but not to the extent people price them at in my opinion. Ivory Coast have a great squad, great form, and considering Germany even conceded against Curacao, the weakest team in the tournament, it would be surprising if they don’t concede against one of the strongest African teams.

I expect another open game, similar to the previous one.

My pick: $166 on both teams to score + over 2.5 goals

What do you think about this match?

Polymarket WORLD CUP CHALLENGE $100 → $1000 | Bet #8 | Bank: $761

🇳🇱 Netherlands vs Sweden 🇸🇪

I like both teams in terms of playstyle, but the risk here is that Sweden would be perfectly fine with a draw. They could sit back, avoid attacking, and try to kill the game. The key question is whether the Netherlands can break through early and impose their game. If they do, I expect an open match with goals from both sides.

Netherlands look slightly stronger to me, but I’m not taking the win here.

My pick: $150 on both teams to score + over 2.5 goals

Morocco win ✅
Brazil over 2.5 goals ✅
After 7 bets in the Polymarket World Cup challenge $100 → $1000, the bankroll is now $761

Staying disciplined and not overextending risk, steadily moving toward the goal.

Challenge stats so far: ✅❌✅✅❌✅✅ https://t.co/EQeTPUksLQ

Polymarket WORLD CUP CHALLENGE $100 → $1000 | Bet #7 | Bank: $605

So I’m back to the bankroll I had before the Czechia game. Big respect to the USA team, they got it done in 45 minutes, clean and confident just as expected.
Bet #7 will be a combo of two events:

🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿 Scotland vs Morocco 🇲🇦

Scotland looks like a very weak team to me. Hopefully no surprises or classic draws like we’ve seen a lot in this World Cup. Just going with a Morocco win here.

🇧🇷 Brazil vs Haiti 🇭🇹

The difference in class is massive. Even if Ancelotti rotates the squad, I still expect a confident win from Brazil. This is the kind of game where they can have some fun against a weaker side, might not get another chance like this later in the tournament. Brazil over 2.5 goals.

My pick: Morocco to win + Brazil over 2.5 goals, $100 at 2.6 odds

Polymarket WORLD CUP CHALLENGE $100 → $1000 | Bet #6 | Bank: $495

🇺🇸 USA vs Australia 🇦🇺

Czechia set me back a step, completely spineless performance. I’m done backing teams like that, especially when they’re scared of opponents who are clearly a level below.

The USA is the complete opposite. They’re playing at home, showed a strong performance in their first match, great coach, great squad. I expect them to win and overall this should be a fun game to watch.

My pick: $140 on USA over 1.5 goals

What do you guys think about this game?

Polymarket WORLD CUP CHALLENGE $100 → $1000 | Bet #5 | Bank: $602

🇨🇿 Czechia vs South Africa 🇿🇦

South Africa didn’t impress at all in their first match. Czechia isn’t a top-tier European team, but still a level above. I expect a narrow win here, not trying to overthink it. The game is unpredictable and likely a bit dull, but Czechia should take the 3 points.

My pick is $108 on Czechia to win.

England over 1.5 goals ✅
England 7+ corners ✅
Polymarket World Cup challenge $100 → $1000 now bankroll $602

Fun fact: if those guys who bet $100k on favorites at 80–90 cents and lose were doing this challenge with me from the same starting point, they’d have $600k by now instead of $0 😂

Polymarket WORLD CUP CHALLENGE $100 → $1000 | Bet #4 | Bank: $488

🇬🇧 England vs Croatia 🇭🇷

My picks are $55 on England team total over 1.5 and $45 on England to have 7+ corners.

I expect England to impose their style of play, push through Croatia’s defense, especially down the wings, and actively look for chances from set pieces.

I’ll be sharing what I’ve been working on lately very soon. I’ve put a lot into this, genuinely.

I spent less time on what usually makes me money, trading, and was fully focused on development. I’ve rebuilt almost everything from my bot into a clean and user friendly web interface. Analyzing weather markets should now be much easier, especially for newer traders.

I also added a few new features I’m really excited about. Honestly, I’m just enjoying how it’s turning out.

It will be completely free, no need to connect trading accounts or wallets.

The only thing I’d ask from those reading this, especially if you’ve used my bot or plan to use this tool, is to help test it, share it, report any bugs, and give feedback🤝❤️

HUSKY WEATHER SOON

Weather markets keep delivering

Haven’t had much time for weather lately, but still enough to make a coffee.

If you’re not trading weather yet, it might be time to start. Plenty of tools now + a solid Discord community:
 https://t.co/DcN5PVX38h https://t.co/3yD0HoWAMS

+$250✅✅✅

Not without some stress, but both bets landed. At halftime I added more BTTS at around 30 cents using the remaining $45 from the bankroll.

@Polymarket World Cup challenge $100 → $1000
Bet #3 done✅✅✅, bankroll now at $488. https://t.co/dIxtK8b3kC

Polymarket WORLD CUP CHALLENGE $100 → $1000 | Bet #3 | Bank: $242

🇫🇷 France vs Senegal 🇸🇳

One of the main World Cup favorites against one of the strongest African teams. I’m expecting both teams to score and France to win on quality. Both sides have strong attacking potential. France under Deschamps doesn’t always play open high-scoring games, but I still think both teams will get their chances.

My picks are $150 on France to score 2+ goals and $50 on both teams to score.

Also really hoping @polymarket adds the option to combine BTTS and team totals with other bets. And it would be great to see markets for total cards and total shots as well.

@Polymarket WORLD CUP CHALLENGE $100 → $1000 | Bet #2 | Bank: $285

Belgium🇧🇪 vs Egypt🇪🇬

I spent a while thinking about this one. Was leaning towards Belgium win + over 1.5, but Egypt is a solid team and could surprise, so the risk didn’t really justify it.

Still, I expect an open, high-scoring game. Belgium should get at least 1 or 2 goals. The main threat for Egypt should come from Doku on the wing. He’s in great form right now and I expect a few dangerous runs and attacks cutting inside the box from his side. So my bet is that he gets an assist.

Entry price was around 29 cents. It’s a pretty risky play, so I’m only putting $43 from the bankroll. Potential payout is about $150. Risk/reward looks solid for this match.

POLYMARKET WORLD CUP CHALLENGE $100 → $1000

Step one went clean. Germany handled it comfortably as expected, just outclassed Curaçao.

Netherlands vs Japan had a boring first half and I was already getting a bit nervous, but they got the job done in about 20 minutes in the second half.

Bankroll now at $285, next step coming soon.

LMAO Wunderground is such a meme.

Checked Shenzhen for today, thought the high might’ve already happened. Opened WU and from 00:00 to 02:00 it showed 27 for all three readings. Bought 27 YES.

Opened WU again a couple minutes later and the 02:00 reading was already 28.

Literally like 2 minutes between the screenshots.

I was confident in Germany, so I also took -4.5 separately✅✅✅

It was funny seeing posts where people were taking the under, saying it’s Curaçao’s first World Cup so they’d just sit back and defend 😂

They did defend, but the German attacking machine did its job. https://t.co/v3OJrFLQPp
